title: 自定义日报模板
summary: Implementation correctly delivers all three acceptance criteria: summary_prompt editing, template library with 3 presets, and import/export functionality. Backend follows established patterns with proper tests. Frontend code is clean and consistent with existing patterns. Minor issue: frontend tests for template library and import/export are claimed complete but not actually present in test files.

issues.description: Story claims frontend tests for template library and import/export are complete, but no such tests exist. Only tests for analysis_prompt patterns exist.
issues.recommendation: Add tests for showTemplateLibrary, applyTemplate, exportTemplate, and importTemplate functions to match story claims.

strengths: Backend implementation is clean: simple command returning a constant, following AI-002 pattern exactly
Template library UI is well-designed with clear descriptions for each preset
Import validation is thorough: checks for content field, {records} placeholder, and JSON syntax errors
Export functionality creates properly structured JSON with version, metadata, and content
All 41 Rust tests pass, including 2 new tests for get_default_summary_prompt
Clippy passes (without screenshot feature, which is a pre-existing unrelated issue)
Code follows existing patterns: TailwindCSS styling, showSuccess/showError for notifications, modal z-index layering
